inputs.research_topic: Biodegradable Packaging Materials for Food Industry
inputs.keywords: biodegradable, compostable, food-safe, barrier properties, shelf-life extension, cost-effective, scalable manufacturing
inputs.additional_information: Creative constraints: Must decompose within 90 days, maintain food safety standards, compete with plastic pricing within 20%, suitable for both dry and moist foods, compatible with existing packaging machinery. Creative stimuli: Consider biomimicry (lotus leaf water resistance, spider silk strength), traditional materials (beeswax, tree bark), emerging technologies (mycelium composites, algae-based films), and unexpected combinations (agricultural waste + nano-coatings). Target: Generate 10-15 novel material concepts that challenge conventional packaging paradigms.
